title: Pickle's Fakemon
description: A Fakemon pack for the cobblemon mod, with regional forms based on popular media, other popular mods, and other silly ideas.
body:
This is a Fakémon pack for the Cobblemon mod, with regional forms based on popular media, other popular mods, and other silly ideas.


### This datapack currently includes 7 Pokémon (see gallery)

### Dependencies 
Farmer's Delight is not required, since you can access all of the Pokémon without it, but it is highly recommended to have.
